subcategory: scroll-triggered orbital animation with concentric circles
use_cases: Landing page hero sections that reveal content as users scroll
Interactive portfolio showcases with expanding orbital elements
Product launch pages with animated feature reveals
Creative agency sites seeking engaging visual storytelling
ai_summary: A scroll-driven animation component featuring concentric circles with gradient backgrounds that expand outward as users scroll. Images orbit from the center based on scroll progress, creating a dynamic reveal effect. Designed for hero sections and landing pages to add visual depth and interactivity through scroll synchronization.
